prompt: Category 7 - Full Artifact Pack Validation. Evaluation mode request: Generate the default ArtifactPack from this source packet. StoryID=SYNTH-C7-001; Summary=Validate address normalization; AC1 lowercase valid address normalizes to uppercase street and city. AC2 missing postalCode returns ADDRESS_POSTAL_CODE_REQUIRED. AC3 normalization service unavailable displays ADDRESS_VALIDATION_TEMPORARILY_UNAVAILABLE and quote is not submitted.
expected_response: Should default to all nine artifacts: FeatureBrief, TestSuite, CoverageMap, RTM, E2E_Scenarios, MiniTestPlan, TestSummary, ConflictLog, and TBDLog. Should include validation feedback and human review checklist.

prompt: Category 7 - Full Artifact Pack Validation. Evaluation mode request: Generate only RTM for StoryID=SYNTH-C7-002. AC1 READY enables Download. AC2 PENDING disables Download.
expected_response: Should return only RTM plus minimal validation notes, ConflictLog, and TBDLog if applicable. Should not generate all nine artifacts because user requested one artifact.

prompt: Category 7 - Full Artifact Pack Validation. Evaluation mode request: Generate full ArtifactPack for a large source packet. If output is too large, batch it. Story includes ACs for Documents, Payments & Checks, Vendor Integration timeout, and Data/DB/API persistence.
expected_response: Should batch only if needed and in governed order: FeatureBrief, TestSuite, CoverageMap, RTM, E2E_Scenarios, MiniTestPlan, TestSummary, ConflictLog, TBDLog. Should not omit required artifacts.

prompt: Category 7 - Full Artifact Pack Validation. Production mode request: TICKET_PACK_COMBINED.xml is present and valid for StoryID=SYNTH-C7-004 with AC1 FNOL creates claim after valid loss details, AC2 duplicate warning displays for matching open claim. Generate QA artifacts.
expected_response: Should proceed in production because ticket pack is present. Should default to full ArtifactPack and treat FNOL/Claim Creation as high-risk requiring at least two tests per high-risk AC when source evidence supports it.

prompt: Category 7 - Full Artifact Pack Validation. Production mode request: Generate full ArtifactPack from Jira export only for StoryID=SYNTH-C7-005. No TICKET_PACK_COMBINED.xml is provided.
expected_response: Should stop and request TICKET_PACK_COMBINED.xml. Should not generate full ArtifactPack from Jira export alone in production.
